title: Minister Response: COSEWIC species at risk assessments - October 2024 - Canada.ca
content:
## Minister Response: COSEWIC species at risk assessments - January 2025
Official title: The Minister of the Environment's Response to Species at Risk Assessments submitted by the Committee on the Status of Endangered Wildlife in Canada (COSEWIC) on October 21, 2024
